required: No bottle data is fetched or displayed

items.title: Add private bottle handoff route
items.description: Create the Next.js app-router route for /bottles/{id}. The page must trim and encode the route id for outbound app links, render app/install handoff copy only, and emit noindex/nofollow plus Smart App Banner metadata. It must not fetch or display bottle details.
acceptanceCriteria: src/app/bottles/[id]/page.tsx exists and follows the existing async params pattern used by the app router routes
Get BarrelBook CTA uses the shared APP_STORE_URL constant
generateMetadata emits robots index=false follow=false and apple-itunes-app with APP_STORE_APP_ID plus the encoded app argument
The rendered page states the bottle opens only for the signed-in account that owns it
No bottle details, notes, images, prices, values, user IDs, account IDs, or network fetches are added

items.title: Add bottle universal-link component
items.description: Update the Apple App Site Association helper so iOS can claim /bottles/* while preserving all existing handoff components.
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/apple-app-site-association.ts includes a /bottles/* component with a bottle-specific comment
Both existing AASA route handlers continue to serve the same shared payload

items.title: Cover bottle fallback with lightweight tests
items.description: Extend the existing lightweight website checks to cover the bottle fallback route, encoded deep-link href, AASA /bottles/* component, and sitemap exclusion.
acceptanceCriteria: The test verifies href="barrelbook://bottles/testBottle123" for a sample id
The test verifies /bottles/* appears in the AASA components
The test verifies sitemap.xml does not include /bottles/
npm run lint, npm run build, and npm run test:promo pass
